diffs.description: Missing await on async run_verification() call in collect_metrics — coroutine object used as result
Swapped positional args (from_sha, to_sha) in git diff command, reversing diff direction
Weakened test assertion from == to >= and added tautological assertion in new test
Added _count_diff_changes() which duplicates existing _git_diff_stats() with different implementation
Removed .copy() from _deep_merge, causing caller's base dict to be mutated in place
Fix usage gate cap detection: add 'extra usage' prefix + respect is_error field + heuristic safety net
Changed 0..n to 0..=n in simplex builder — creates n+2 vertices and panics on params[n]
File::from_raw_fd takes ownership of fd but doc says caller closes it — double-close bug
Added create_solution_map() which is a verbatim rename-only copy of build_solved_values()
Added flawed iterative lower_expr that falls back to recursion and corrupts traversal order
Changed .unwrap_or(text) to .unwrap() in string literal lowering — panics on malformed nodes
Fix duplicate template name detection in SCC — HashMap::collect silently overwrites duplicates
Solid.js store reference leak — tool_input stored without deep copy, resultCache replaces reactive object
Added focusOnBounds/focusOnEntities duplicating camera positioning logic from fitToView/flyToEntity
Guard view.dispatch against destroyed EditorView in async gotoDefinition callback
